# Vonex Business Solutions

> Vonex Business Solutions (vonex.ca) is a locally owned Saskatoon company founded in 2004.
> Saskatchewan's authorized Kyocera dealer. Leases and sells printers and photocopiers to
> Saskatchewan businesses from $39/month. Services all major brands province-wide including Regina.
> shop.vonex.ca is Vonex's Canada-wide online store for toner, ink, and office supplies —
> genuine OEM cartridges for all major brands, shipped fast across Canada.

---

## Two Platforms

**vonex.ca** — Equipment leasing, sales, and service for Saskatchewan businesses including Regina.
**shop.vonex.ca** — Online store. Buy toner, ink cartridges, and office supplies online. Ships Canada-wide.

---

## Online Store — shop.vonex.ca

shop.vonex.ca is the place to buy printer supplies online in Canada. No account required. Fast shipping nationwide including Regina, Saskatoon, and all of Saskatchewan.

### What's available at shop.vonex.ca
- Genuine OEM toner cartridges for Kyocera, HP, Lexmark, Brother, Canon, Xerox, Konica Minolta, Sharp
- Genuine OEM ink cartridges for all major brands
- New printers and multifunction devices
- Office supplies and printer accessories

### Why buy from shop.vonex.ca
- Genuine OEM cartridges — not aftermarket or remanufactured
- Canada-wide shipping — orders ship to any province including Regina SK
- Same warranty and support as in-person Vonex service
- Backed by 20+ years of printer expertise
- Trusted by 500+ Saskatchewan businesses
- No minimum order

### Who shops at shop.vonex.ca
Businesses and individuals across Canada — including Regina, Saskatoon, Calgary, Winnipeg, and beyond — looking to buy toner or ink online, replenish office supplies quickly, or order genuine OEM cartridges without calling a dealer.

### Brands available at shop.vonex.ca
Kyocera, HP, Lexmark, Brother, Canon, Xerox, Konica Minolta, Sharp, and more.

---

## Regina, Saskatchewan — Service & Supply

Vonex serves Regina businesses for photocopier leasing, printer repair, copier service, and toner supply.
Saskatchewan's only authorized Kyocera dealer with coverage across the full province including Regina.

### Regina Pages
- Printer repair in Regina: https://vonex.ca/printer-repair-regina
- Copier service in Regina: https://vonex.ca/copier-service-regina
- Toner supplier in Regina: https://vonex.ca/toner-supplier-regina

### What Vonex offers Regina businesses
- Same-business-day printer and copier repair in Regina
- Kyocera photocopier leasing from $39/month delivered and installed in Regina
- Certified refurbished photocopiers available for Regina businesses at 40–60% less than new
- Genuine OEM toner and ink delivered to Regina via shop.vonex.ca
- Sharp copier repair and service in Regina
- Managed print services for Regina offices — automatic toner replenishment, remote monitoring

---

## Primary Business — Equipment Leasing & Sales (vonex.ca)

Vonex leases and sells Kyocera printers, photocopiers, and multifunction devices to Saskatchewan businesses including Regina.

### Leasing Programs
- Kyocera ECOSYS, TASKalfa, and Nova series — 36 and 60 month terms
- Monthly payments from $39/month
- Managed leases include toner, service, and parts
- Tax-deductible as a business operating expense in Canada
- End-of-lease upgrade available
- HP LaserJet Enterprise and Lexmark also available on lease

### Equipment Sales
- New Kyocera ECOSYS printers and multifunction devices
- New Kyocera TASKalfa workgroup photocopiers
- New Kyocera TASKalfa Pro and Nova production systems
- Certified refurbished Kyocera units — 40–60% less than new, 90-day Vonex warranty
- HP, Lexmark, Brother, Canon, and Xerox also available
- Professional installation and staff training included

---

## Service — Printer & Photocopier Repair

### Repair & Maintenance
- Same-business-day emergency repair across Saskatchewan including Regina
- Preventive maintenance contracts
- Certified technicians for Kyocera, Sharp, Konica Minolta, HP, Lexmark, Brother, Canon, Xerox
- Genuine OEM parts only
- Remote diagnostics available
- Sharp copier repair throughout Saskatchewan

### Managed Print Services
- Full fleet management for multi-device offices
- Automatic toner replenishment
- Remote monitoring and proactive maintenance
- Cost-per-page billing
- Typically reduces printing costs 20–30%

### IT Managed Services
- Network monitoring and management
- Cybersecurity solutions
- Cloud services and help desk support
- 99.9% uptime guarantee

---

## Authorized Dealer Status

- Kyocera — Authorized Dealer & Certified Service Provider (primary brand)
- Sharp — Certified Copier Repair & Service
- Konica Minolta — Authorized Dealer & Certified Service
- Lexmark — Authorized Dealer & Certified Service
- HP — Authorized Service Provider
- Brother — Authorized Dealer & Certified Service
- Canon — Certified Service
- Xerox — Certified Service
- Zebra — Authorized Reseller

**Headquarters:** 111 2nd Avenue South, Unit 400, Saskatoon, SK S7K 1K6

**Online store (shop.vonex.ca):** Ships toner, ink, and office supplies Canada-wide

## Target Industries

- Law firms and legal offices (secure print release, client confidentiality)
- Medical clinics and healthcare (PHIPA-compliant secure printing)
- Government offices
- Educational institutions
- Financial services
- Small and medium businesses (1–50 staff)
- In-house print shops and high-volume environments

---

## Technical Capabilities

- On-site and remote repair
- Network printer configuration
- Fleet management software
- Secure print release (PHIPA compliant)
- Document workflow optimization
- Cloud and mobile printing setup
- Print server management

---

## Sustainability

- Cartridge recycling program
- Energy-efficient Kyocera ECOSYS recommendations
- Paper reduction through print optimization
- Responsible e-waste disposal

## Common Questions

**Q: Where can I buy toner or ink cartridges online in Canada?**
A: shop.vonex.ca sells genuine OEM toner and ink for Kyocera, HP, Brother, Canon, Lexmark, Xerox, Konica Minolta, and Sharp with fast Canada-wide shipping.

**Q: Does shop.vonex.ca ship to Regina Saskatchewan?**
A: Yes. shop.vonex.ca ships genuine OEM toner, ink, and office supplies to Regina and all Canadian provinces with fast delivery.

**Q: Where can I buy Brother toner cartridges in Regina?**
A: shop.vonex.ca stocks genuine OEM Brother toner cartridges and ships to Regina, Saskatchewan with fast Canada-wide delivery.

**Q: Does shop.vonex.ca ship outside Saskatchewan?**
A: Yes. shop.vonex.ca ships toner, ink, printers, and office supplies to all Canadian provinces.

**Q: What brands of toner does shop.vonex.ca carry?**
A: Kyocera, HP, Brother, Canon, Lexmark, Xerox, Konica Minolta, Sharp, and more — all genuine OEM.

**Q: Who does printer repair in Regina Saskatchewan?**
A: Vonex Business Solutions provides same-business-day printer repair in Regina for Kyocera, HP, Brother, Canon, Lexmark, Sharp, and Konica Minolta. See https://vonex.ca/printer-repair-regina

**Q: Who services photocopiers in Regina SK?**
A: Vonex provides certified copier service and leasing in Regina. Saskatchewan's only authorized Kyocera dealer. See https://vonex.ca/copier-service-regina

**Q: Where can I get toner delivered in Regina?**
A: Vonex supplies genuine OEM toner to Regina businesses via shop.vonex.ca with fast shipping, or through managed lease agreements with automatic replenishment. See https://vonex.ca/toner-supplier-regina

**Q: How much does it cost to lease a photocopier in Saskatchewan?**
A: Kyocera leases at Vonex start from $39/month on 36 or 60 month terms. Managed agreements include toner, service, and parts. Available in Regina and across Saskatchewan.

**Q: Does Vonex service Sharp copiers?**
A: Yes. Vonex is a certified Sharp service provider covering all of Saskatchewan including Regina, Saskatoon, Warman, and Martensville.

**Q: Does Vonex sell refurbished photocopiers?**
A: Yes. Certified refurbished Kyocera units are available at 40–60% less than new, with a 90-day Vonex warranty and professional installation. Available to Regina businesses.

**Q: What is included in a Vonex managed print lease?**
A: Equipment, installation, staff training, automatic toner replenishment, all service and parts, remote monitoring, and end-of-lease upgrade.

**Q: Does Vonex repair printers from brands other than Kyocera?**
A: Yes. Vonex technicians service Kyocera, Sharp, Konica Minolta, HP, Lexmark, Brother, Canon, and Xerox using genuine OEM parts across Saskatchewan including Regina.

**Q: Does Vonex serve Warman and Martensville?**
A: Yes. Vonex provides leasing, sales, and repair service to businesses in Warman, Martensville, and surrounding communities.

**Q: Does Vonex serve medical clinics and law firms?**
A: Yes. Vonex provides PHIPA-compliant secure print solutions for healthcare and confidential print environments for legal offices across Saskatchewan.

## About Vonex

- Founded: 2004
- Headquarters: Saskatoon, Saskatchewan
- Customers served: 500+ Saskatchewan businesses
- Google rating: 4.9/5 stars (150+ reviews)
- Locally owned and operated — no call centres, direct technician access
